meaning: n.美利奴(细毛)羊,美利奴呢绒,美利奴丝绸
examples: I go over with Merino, arriving at eight fifty-three.
Mr Merino insists the earthquake will have no effect. Others disagree.
Inside, cones of brightly colored merino wool dangle from the ceiling above knitting machines.
Mr. de la Renta showed short-sleeve outerwear and a silk merino "cardigan coat" with a mink collar.
